dashboard.telegram_desc: Get real-time trade / TP / SL notifications

about.title: About Site
about.p1: Welcome to my **BTC Trading Analysis & Account Backtest Dashboard**. This site aims to provide transparent and verifiable trading records, allowing followers to clearly understand the logic and actual execution results behind each strategy.
about.feat1: **Real-time Analysis**: The left list shows technical analysis and trade suggestions for BTC market conditions.
about.feat2: **PnL Dashboard**: Connects to OKX API to display real-time account PnL, with full tracking of daily net profit and cumulative returns.
about.feat3: **Transparent Performance**: Every fee, funding rate, and transfer has been reconciled to ensure the accuracy and authenticity of ROI calculations.
about.powered_by_desc: Analysis reports and trading decisions are powered by **Claude Sonnet (Anthropic)**.
about.p2: If you are interested in my trading strategies, feel free to register on exchanges via the referral links below. Not only can you get exclusive fee discounts, but it's also the best way to support me!
